presentation.title: Deck 02 — Growth Engine Workshop (In-App)
presentation.subtitle: Replaced by Playbook Growth Engine Worksheet

slides.title: Open Growth Engine Worksheet
slides.body:
Deck 02 is now an in-app interactive module.

Interns complete the Growth Engine Worksheet in Playbook — canvas, targets, FEC sync, and pitch checklist.

Facilitators: use staff preview to project the worksheet on screen.
slides.speakerNotes: Direct squads to Playbook → Week 3 Day 4 mission view. Circulate during Acts 2–3.
